TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouConv-typhoon
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'o vcongʉsi to ha hanako ci ihe ne spukunu ne noana'o au.
S.PHON: ʔo vʦoŋɨsi to ha hanako ʦi ihe ne spukunu ne noanaʔo au.
S.FORM: 'o vcongʉsi to ha hanako ci ihe ne spukunu ne noana'o au.
S.PHON: ʔo vʦoŋɨsi to ha hanako ʦi ihe ne spukunu ne noanaʔo au.
S.TRANSL: 以前hanako的先生在Spukunu那裡.
In the past, Hanako's husband was in Spukunu.

S.FORM: 'a 'a moso la no maezo fiho uh ne'e moso la ehtothomʉ.
S.PHON: ʔa ʔa moso ɗa no maezo fiho uh neʔe moso ɗa ehtothomɨ.
S.FORM: 'a 'a moso la no maezo fiho uh ne'e moso la ehtothomʉ.
S.PHON: ʔa ʔa moso ɗa no maezo fiho uh neʔe moso ɗa ehtothomɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 以前戰爭的時候,那邊的人也有跟著去(打仗)

S.TRANSL: 以前戰爭的時候,那邊的人也有跟著去

TRANSL.notes: In the war, people there also followed (to fight).

S.TRANSL: In the war, people there also followed .

S.FORM: eh uh ho la uh ne'e lasi acnia engha X.
S.PHON: eh uh ho ɗa uh neʔe ɗasi aʦnia eŋha *.
S.FORM: eh uh ho la uh ne'e lasi acnia engha X.
S.PHON: eh uh ho ɗa uh neʔe ɗasi aʦnia eŋha *.

TRANSL.notes: 我每次去那邊他每次必定都講(這件事).

S.TRANSL: 我每次去那邊他每次必定都講 .

TRANSL.notes: Every time I went there, he definitely told (such a story).

S.TRANSL: Every time I went there, he definitely told .

S.FORM: zou mai ho la 'a 'so no eainca ntoho la mici XXXX m'ene ne maaya no na ino peisu.
S.PHON: zou mai ho ɗa ʔa ʔso no eainʦa ntoho ɗa miʦi **** mʔene ne maaja no na ino peisu.
S.FORM: zou mai ho la 'a 'so no eainca ntoho la mici XXXX m'ene ne maaya no na ino peisu.
S.PHON: zou mai ho ɗa ʔa ʔso no eainʦa ntoho ɗa miʦi **** mʔene ne maaja no na ino peisu.
S.TRANSL: 比方說, 他們曾經曾經想要向日本要錢.
For example, they had been considering to ask for money from Japan.

S.FORM: ia zou honci eainca 'a la e eh si av'a no.
S.PHON: ia zou honʦi eainʦa ʔa ɗa e eh si avʔa no.
S.FORM: ia zou honci eainca 'a la e eh si av'a no.
S.PHON: ia zou honʦi eainʦa ʔa ɗa e eh si avʔa no.
S.TRANSL: 對. 如果說... 該怎麼說....?
Yes. If.... How should we say...?

S.FORM: o'a ihe no fii.
S.PHON: oʔa ihe no fii.
S.FORM: o'a ihe no fii.
S.PHON: oʔa ihe no fii.

TRANSL.notes: 他們沒有給(錢)嗎?

S.TRANSL: 他們沒有給 嗎?

TRANSL.notes: They didn't give (them money)?

S.TRANSL: They didn't give ?

S.FORM: eh bochio ihe nana fii ho.
S.PHON: eh ɓoʦhio ihe nana fii ho.
S.FORM: eh bochio ihe nana fii ho.
S.PHON: eh ɓoʦhio ihe nana fii ho.
S.TRANSL: 據說他們給了.
It is heard that they gave some.

S.FORM: 'a ohe acʉha 'a ohe acʉha nenusi no mo yu yungefi ho oh ia mo n'a ako la unto.
S.PHON: ʔa ohe aʦɨha ʔa ohe aʦɨha nenusi no mo ju juŋefi ho oh ia mo nʔa ako ɗa unto.
S.FORM: 'a ohe acʉha 'a ohe acʉha nenusi no mo yu yungefi ho oh ia mo n'a ako la unto.
S.PHON: ʔa ohe aʦɨha ʔa ohe aʦɨha nenusi no mo ju juŋefi ho oh ia mo nʔa ako ɗa unto.
S.TRANSL: 不曉得他們到底是不是嫌不夠,他們還在不斷的運動當中.
Perhaps they complained the money insufficient, so they still keep on exercising.

S.FORM: ahoi ne auyusi ne an ancu ho la moso la ahoi to moso eh maezo yuyafo ho unto no enca te m'eovei.
S.PHON: ahoi ne aujusi ne an anʦu ho ɗa moso ɗa ahoi to moso eh maezo jujafo ho unto no enʦa te mʔeovei.
S.FORM: ahoi ne auyusi ne an ancu ho la moso la ahoi to moso eh maezo yuyafo ho unto no enca te m'eovei.
S.PHON: ahoi ne aujusi ne an anʦu ho ɗa moso ɗa ahoi to moso eh maezo jujafo ho unto no enʦa te mʔeovei.

TRANSL.notes: 最初, 還沒有說XXX,...曾經 剛開始的時候, (那邊的人)也出來參加討錢的活動.

S.TRANSL: 最初, 還沒有說XXX,...曾經 剛開始的時候, 也出來參加討錢的活動.

TRANSL.notes: In the beginning, when XXXX had not been proposed, (people there) also stood out for the activity of asking for (the compensation money).

S.TRANSL: In the beginning, when XXXX had not been proposed, also stood out for the activity of asking for .

S.FORM: oh lasi acnia engha enivo.
S.PHON: oh ɗasi aʦnia eŋha enivo.
S.FORM: oh lasi acnia engha enivo.
S.PHON: oh ɗasi aʦnia eŋha enivo.
S.TRANSL: 他每次都講這個.
He always talks about this.

S.FORM: oh ma mo asonʉ yungefi.
S.PHON: oh ma mo asonɨ juŋefi.
S.FORM: oh ma mo asonʉ yungefi.
S.PHON: oh ma mo asonɨ juŋefi.
S.TRANSL: 可能是嫌少.

TRANSL.notes: (They) may possibly consider it is not enough.

S.TRANSL: may possibly consider it is not enough.

S.FORM: ake'a n'a fii.
S.PHON: akeʔa nʔa fii.
S.FORM: ake'a n'a fii.
S.PHON: akeʔa nʔa fii.
S.TRANSL: 稍微再給一點.

TRANSL.notes: (Just) give slightly more money...

S.TRANSL: give slightly more money...

S.FORM: Yingkaidoyola.
S.PHON: jiŋkai*ojoɗa.
S.FORM: Yingkaidoyola.
S.PHON: jiŋkai*ojoɗa.

TRANSL.notes: 應該都有(拿到錢).

S.TRANSL: 應該都有 .

TRANSL.notes: (They) should have got (such money).

S.TRANSL: should have got .

S.FORM: inia no 'o nia no.
S.PHON: inia no ʔo nia no.
S.FORM: inia no 'o nia no.
S.PHON: inia no ʔo nia no.
S.TRANSL: 以前的那個....
In the past, the....

S.FORM: i'o i'o m i'o moso mcoi ua ohke cu fii.
S.PHON: iʔo iʔo m iʔo moso mʦoi ua ohke ʦu fii.
S.FORM: i'o i'o m i'o moso mcoi ua ohke cu fii.
S.PHON: iʔo iʔo m iʔo moso mʦoi ua ohke ʦu fii.
S.TRANSL: 那時候死的是有給啦.

TRANSL.notes: For those dead, they gave (the money) indeed.

S.TRANSL: For those dead, they gave indeed.

S.FORM: mo c'o 'so at'ingi kakutia.
S.PHON: mo ʦʔo ʔso atʔiŋi kakutia.
S.FORM: mo c'o 'so at'ingi kakutia.
S.PHON: mo ʦʔo ʔso atʔiŋi kakutia.
S.TRANSL: 但是只有很少.

TRANSL.notes: But (the money was) little.

S.TRANSL: But little.

S.FORM: 'o a'ʉmtʉ 'o a'ʉmtʉ alʉ ak'i eh wodechinwaikong eh 'a ohe cu acʉha.
S.PHON: ʔo aʔɨmtɨ ʔo aʔɨmtɨ aɗɨ akʔi eh *o*eʦhin*aikoŋ eh ʔa ohe ʦu aʦɨha.
S.FORM: 'o a'ʉmtʉ 'o a'ʉmtʉ alʉ ak'i eh wodechinwaikong eh 'a ohe cu acʉha.
S.PHON: ʔo aʔɨmtɨ ʔo aʔɨmtɨ aɗɨ akʔi eh *o*eʦhin*aikoŋ eh ʔa ohe ʦu aʦɨha.
S.TRANSL: 我的爺爺,他們已經全部.
My real grandfathers, they are all....

S.FORM: oh moso maeo amo'u si no hafa uh to inoconi ho ito ba'i.
S.PHON: oh moso maeo amoʔu si no hafa uh to inoʦoni ho ito ɓaʔi.
S.FORM: oh moso maeo amo'u si no hafa uh to inoconi ho ito ba'i.
S.PHON: oh moso maeo amoʔu si no hafa uh to inoʦoni ho ito ɓaʔi.
S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸也有拿去給我的姑姑和祖母.

TRANSL.notes: My father also brought (the money) to my aunt and grandmother.

S.TRANSL: My father also brought to my aunt and grandmother.

S.FORM: mo moso ak'i man'i.
S.PHON: mo moso akʔi manʔi.
S.FORM: mo moso ak'i man'i.
S.PHON: mo moso akʔi manʔi.

TRANSL.notes: (錢)有沒有多一點?

S.TRANSL: 有沒有多一點?

TRANSL.notes: Is (the money) much?

S.TRANSL: Is much?

S.FORM: na a'o.
S.PHON: na aʔo.
S.FORM: na a'o.
S.PHON: na aʔo.
S.TRANSL: 我嗎?
Me?

S.FORM: zou.
S.PHON: zou.
S.FORM: zou.
S.PHON: zou.
S.TRANSL: 對.
Yes.

S.FORM: eh mo'u maeo to hookiyu.
S.PHON: eh moʔu maeo to hookiju.
S.FORM: eh mo'u maeo to hookiyu.
S.PHON: eh moʔu maeo to hookiju.
S.TRANSL: 我是領薪水的.

TRANSL.notes: I got salary (in the war).

S.TRANSL: I got salary .

S.FORM: hookiyu eh zou na nia na nia hookiyu ho moso la heitai.
S.PHON: hookiju eh zou na nia na nia hookiju ho moso ɗa heitai.
S.FORM: hookiyu eh zou na nia na nia hookiyu ho moso la heitai.
S.PHON: hookiju eh zou na nia na nia hookiju ho moso ɗa heitai.
S.TRANSL: 薪水,對,他是拿那時當兵的薪水.

TRANSL.notes: Salary, yes, (he got) salary when he was a solider.

S.TRANSL: Salary, yes, salary when he was a solider.

S.FORM: zou oh 'a micu na'no man'i totuiha c'o nanamangosenyen.
S.PHON: zou oh ʔa miʦu naʔno manʔi totuiha ʦʔo nanamaŋosenjen.
S.FORM: zou oh 'a micu na'no man'i totuiha c'o nanamangosenyen.
S.PHON: zou oh ʔa miʦu naʔno manʔi totuiha ʦʔo nanamaŋosenjen.
S.TRANSL: 那沒有很多啦,三年才七萬五千元.
Not so much, there was only 75,000 Japanese Yens for 3 years.

S.FORM: mosu s'a mosu totuiha ho mosu.
S.PHON: mosu sʔa mosu totuiha ho mosu.
S.FORM: mosu s'a mosu totuiha ho mosu.
S.PHON: mosu sʔa mosu totuiha ho mosu.
S.TRANSL: 你是...你是三年在...
For three years, you were...

S.FORM: mi'o yone'e.
S.PHON: miʔo joneʔe.
S.FORM: mi'o yone'e.
S.PHON: miʔo joneʔe.
S.TRANSL: 我在那裡.
I was there.

S.FORM: te n'a peela eainca ak'a ao'pova.
S.PHON: te nʔa peeɗa eainʦa akʔa aoʔpova.
S.FORM: te n'a peela eainca ak'a ao'pova.
S.PHON: te nʔa peeɗa eainʦa akʔa aoʔpova.
S.TRANSL: 還算是有稍微安撫的意思.

TRANSL.notes: (That money) was somewhat able to pacify (you).

S.TRANSL: was somewhat able to pacify .

S.FORM: maka ake'a ao'po'pova.
S.PHON: maka akeʔa aoʔpoʔpova.
S.FORM: maka ake'a ao'po'pova.
S.PHON: maka akeʔa aoʔpoʔpova.
S.TRANSL: 起碼稍微安撫一下.

TRANSL.notes: (The money/The Japanese government had to somewhat pacify (you) at least.

S.TRANSL: at least.

S.FORM: ci mio no kuzo.
S.PHON: ʦi mio no kuzo.
S.FORM: ci mio no kuzo.
S.PHON: ʦi mio no kuzo.
S.TRANSL: 這樣也沒什麼不好.
It's not so bad.

S.FORM: zou 'a mosu s'a no nia ohe niate auni no ang angumu.
S.PHON: zou ʔa mosu sʔa no nia ohe niate auni no aŋ aŋumu.
S.FORM: zou 'a mosu s'a no nia ohe niate auni no ang angumu.
S.PHON: zou ʔa mosu sʔa no nia ohe niate auni no aŋ aŋumu.
S.TRANSL: 你不是差一點被洋人幹掉啊?
Weren't you almost killed by western people?

S.FORM: anna'o uk'a ci mo 'so ahtu mokalu ho mo yu'susuyumo.
S.PHON: annaʔo ukʔa ʦi mo ʔso ahtu mokaɗu ho mo juʔsusujumo.
S.FORM: anna'o uk'a ci mo 'so ahtu mokalu ho mo yu'susuyumo.
S.PHON: annaʔo ukʔa ʦi mo ʔso ahtu mokaɗu ho mo juʔsusujumo.
S.TRANSL: 戰爭原本就沒有人真正佔到便宜.
In a war, by nature no one really takes advantage.

S.FORM: osu s'a eainca ak'i eno su nte cu c'o nte cu c'o nte cu c'o aʉmta auni no no amelika honcimu honci c'u te make.
S.PHON: osu sʔa eainʦa akʔi eno su nte ʦu ʦʔo nte ʦu ʦʔo nte ʦu ʦʔo aɨmta auni no no ameɗika honʦimu honʦi ʦʔu te make.
S.FORM: osu s'a eainca ak'i eno su nte cu c'o nte cu c'o nte cu c'o aʉmta auni no no amelika honcimu honci c'u te make.
S.PHON: osu sʔa eainʦa akʔi eno su nte ʦu ʦʔo nte ʦu ʦʔo nte ʦu ʦʔo aɨmta auni no no ameɗika honʦimu honʦi ʦʔu te make.

TRANSL.notes: Ak'i (外公)你不是有講過說,如果說你們失敗的話,你們幾乎要被美國人幹掉了?

S.TRANSL: Ak'i 你不是有講過說,如果說你們失敗的話,你們幾乎要被美國人幹掉了?
Grandfather, have you ever said that, if you had really failed, you would almost have been killed by the Americans?

S.FORM: ma o'a te cu c'o ah 'ana te s'a mako yikeyuei honcimza ako ma'nao isi cu atpʉta 'o maaya.
S.PHON: ma oʔa te ʦu ʦʔo ah ʔana te sʔa mako jikejuei honʦimza ako maʔnao isi ʦu atpɨta ʔo maaja.
S.FORM: ma o'a te cu c'o ah 'ana te s'a mako yikeyuei honcimza ako ma'nao isi cu atpʉta 'o maaya.
S.PHON: ma oʔa te ʦu ʦʔo ah ʔana te sʔa mako jikejuei honʦimza ako maʔnao isi ʦu atpɨta ʔo maaja.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們一直逗留在那邊,不到一個月日本人已經被打敗了.
If we had kept lingering there, Japanese would have been beaten within one month.

S.FORM: n'a eansoua oh.
S.PHON: nʔa eansoua oh.
S.FORM: n'a eansoua oh.
S.PHON: nʔa eansoua oh.
S.TRANSL: 我們還活著.
We are still alive.

S.FORM: ma asonʉ ancu ntoho teseupngʉ honci ntoho o'te cu atpʉta 'o maaya.
S.PHON: ma asonɨ anʦu ntoho teseupŋɨ honʦi ntoho oʔte ʦu atpɨta ʔo maaja.
S.FORM: ma asonʉ ancu ntoho teseupngʉ honci ntoho o'te cu atpʉta 'o maaya.
S.PHON: ma asonɨ anʦu ntoho teseupŋɨ honʦi ntoho oʔte ʦu atpɨta ʔo maaja.
S.TRANSL: 如果那個時候還沒有把日本人打敗的話,戰爭還沒有結束.
If the Japanese were not defeated at that time, the war would have not yet finished.

S.FORM: zou 'a isi cu no taipuya 'o maaya micu.
S.PHON: zou ʔa isi ʦu no taipuja ʔo maaja miʦu.
S.FORM: zou 'a isi cu no taipuya 'o maaya micu.
S.PHON: zou ʔa isi ʦu no taipuja ʔo maaja miʦu.
S.TRANSL: 對啊,那時候已經把日本人扳倒了.

TRANSL.notes: Yes, (at that time) Japanese had been knocked down.

S.TRANSL: Yes, Japanese had been knocked down.

S.FORM: pamaine'e?
S.PHON: pamaineʔe?
S.FORM: pamaine'e?
S.PHON: pamaineʔe?

TRANSL.notes: 讓你們回家嗎?(是不是就這樣子給你們回家?)

S.TRANSL: 讓你們回家嗎?

TRANSL.notes: (So, they) let you go home?

S.TRANSL: let you go home?

S.FORM: o'tena ehtothomʉ.
S.PHON: oʔtena ehtothomɨ.
S.FORM: o'tena ehtothomʉ.
S.PHON: oʔtena ehtothomɨ.
S.TRANSL: 已經沒有作戰了.
There was no war.

S.FORM: zou 'a momu s'a anana'o zua make?
S.PHON: zou ʔa momu sʔa ananaʔo zua make?
S.FORM: zou 'a momu s'a anana'o zua make?
S.PHON: zou ʔa momu sʔa ananaʔo zua make?
S.TRANSL: 你們是不是原本就存心失敗?
Didn't you deliberately intend to lose?

S.FORM: WGS tiate atpʉtʉ.
S.PHON: **s tiate atpɨtɨ.
S.FORM: WGS tiate atpʉtʉ.
S.PHON: **s tiate atpɨtɨ.
S.TRANSL: 差一點就打贏了.

TRANSL.notes: (You) almost won.

S.TRANSL: almost won.

S.FORM: WGS h'unano biteuyunu ho ako suyumo 'o maaya.
S.PHON: **s hʔunano ɓiteujunu ho ako sujumo ʔo maaja.
S.FORM: WGS h'unano biteuyunu ho ako suyumo 'o maaya.
S.PHON: **s hʔunano ɓiteujunu ho ako sujumo ʔo maaja.

TRANSL.notes: 特別是,日本人合力一直侵略(別人).

S.TRANSL: 特別是,日本人合力一直侵略 .

TRANSL.notes: Especially, Japanese joined force and continuously invaded (other countries).

S.TRANSL: Especially, Japanese joined force and continuously invaded .

S.FORM: nemio zou c'o maica hia okosi.
S.PHON: nemio zou ʦʔo maiʦa hia okosi.
S.FORM: nemio zou c'o maica hia okosi.
S.PHON: nemio zou ʦʔo maiʦa hia okosi.

TRANSL.notes: 對啊,就這麼小的(國家).

S.TRANSL: 對啊,就這麼小的 .

TRANSL.notes: Yes, just a small (country).

S.TRANSL: Yes, just a small .

S.FORM: suyumohe.
S.PHON: sujumohe.
S.FORM: suyumohe.
S.PHON: sujumohe.

TRANSL.notes: 反而去侵略(人家).

S.TRANSL: 反而去侵略 .

TRANSL.notes: To our surprise, (they) invaded (other countries)

S.TRANSL: To our surprise, invaded

S.FORM: une cooceng ne ap c'o maica hia okosi.
S.PHON: une ʦooʦeŋ ne ap ʦʔo maiʦa hia okosi.
S.FORM: une cooceng ne ap c'o maica hia okosi.
S.PHON: une ʦooʦeŋ ne ap ʦʔo maiʦa hia okosi.
S.TRANSL: 這麼小的國家.
A country so small.

S.FORM: ne apihana ohe eae taivang su su'uni ne nanyangshan ho ucia suyumi.
S.PHON: ne apihana ohe eae taivaŋ su suʔuni ne nanjaŋshan ho uʦia sujumi.
S.FORM: ne apihana ohe eae taivang su su'uni ne nanyangshan ho ucia suyumi.
S.PHON: ne apihana ohe eae taivaŋ su suʔuni ne nanjaŋshan ho uʦia sujumi.

TRANSL.notes: (日本人) 想要侵略從朝鮮到對岸,台灣,到南洋.

S.TRANSL: 想要侵略從朝鮮到對岸,台灣,到南洋.

TRANSL.notes: (Japanese) wanted to invade (the areas) Korea, the other side of the Taiwan Strait, Taiwan and Nanyang.

S.TRANSL: wanted to invade Korea, the other side of the Taiwan Strait, Taiwan and Nanyang.

S.FORM: 'so a'ʉmta tau taunanavʉ na na nia cou nemio 'a.
S.PHON: ʔso aʔɨmta tau taunanavɨ na na nia ʦou nemio ʔa.
S.FORM: 'so a'ʉmta tau taunanavʉ na na nia cou nemio 'a.
S.PHON: ʔso aʔɨmta tau taunanavɨ na na nia ʦou nemio ʔa.
S.TRANSL: 很欽佩當時的鄒人.
